title: Trump admin does not need to reinstall exhibits before USA's 250th, court says
shortDescription: The Trump administration does not need to reinstall dozens of exhibits it removed from national parks before the nation's 250th anniversary, a court ruled.

title: Will Trump's Great American State Fair kickoff be streamed online?
shortDescription: The Great American State Fair opening ceremony is Wednesday and will include remarks from President Donald Trump and a performance from Lee Greenwood.

shortDescription: Trump is taking an unusual trek to Capitol Hill for what one Republican senator hopes will be "robust conversations."

title: Who got experimental Eli Lilly obesity drug? Not Trump, White House says
shortDescription: Pharmaceutical giant Eli Lilly gave an unidentified 79-year-old man exclusive access to an obesity and diabetes drug, media outlet STAT reported.

title: New housing bill targets affordability
shortDescription: A bipartisan housing bill in Congress targets affordability by boosting supply and cutting housing costs across the U.S.

title: Senate signals shift on Iran war
shortDescription: The Senate passed a symbolic War Powers resolution on Iran, signaling eroding GOP support.

title: Paxton Rebounds Past Talarico as Republicans Consolidate in Poll
shortDescription: Ken Paxton and James Talarico sit one point apart in a new Texas Senate poll as the race tightens. Here's what you need to know.

title: Rebuking Trump, Senate signals support for ending Iran war
shortDescription: Both chambers of Congress have now signaled support for ending the war in Iran, reflecting lawmakers' growing unease with the conflict.

title: Pew surveyed 36 nations about Trump, US. The results were dim
shortDescription: Trump likes to boast that under his leadership, the U.S. is the world's hottest, most respected country. A recent Pew survey found just the opposite.

title: New poll shows Trump approval drop as economic fears rise
shortDescription: A new poll shows Trump at his lowest approval yet, with growing economic concerns shaping voter outlook ahead of the 2026 midterms

title: The new Air Force One from Qatar is destined for Trump's library
shortDescription: President Donald Trump on June 19 unveiled the new Air Force One plane from Qatar. It will only be temporary before ending up in his museum.

title: Trump reports arrests for Reflecting Pool damage
shortDescription: President Donald Trump says arrests were made after placing blame for damage to the Reflecting Pool and repairs are planned ahead of July 4th.

title: From drones to nukes, what Trump's war in Iran has gained and cost
shortDescription: Iran's navy and air force have been hit hard. But Trump's MAGA base is split and an alliance with Israel fractured. What are the tradeoffs so far?
